---
title: "Mechanical Resolution Types"
aliases: []
family: "Systems & Mechanics"
media: []
facets:
  effects: []
  problems: []
  components: []
  genre: []
provenance: ""
---

## Referenced by

- [Rulings vs Rules & the Authority Contract](../players-social-dynamics/rulings-vs-rules-and-the-authority-contract.qmd)
